DatasetTitle: COUNTRY OF BIRTH BY NATIONAL IDENTITY (CLASSIFICATION 2)
Annotations: 1. 'EU' is the European Union and is as defined on Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. 'Other' consists of persons born at sea or in the air, or with country of birth not stated.; 3. 'Member countries prior to 2004 expansion' includes United Kingdom (part not specified) and Ireland (part not specified).
